result.reason: LLM actions are disabled by default; no local provider is configured.
result.disabled_reason: LLM actions are disabled by default; no local provider is configured.
privacy_notes: No credentials are read, logged, stored in SQLite, or written to the project directory.
This method does not execute a provider request and performs no network I/O.
Any future LLM output must remain a draft; writes require explicit user copy or a separate non-LLM write action.

confirmation.message: User confirmation is required before any future LLM provider request.
